jobs.title: E-Commerce Content & Campaign Specialist
jobs.description:
Reporting directly to the Head of E-commerce, the E-commerce Content & Campaign Specialist will play a key global role in the activities of production and execution of digital campaigns across owned digital channels. The primary objective of the role is to oversee the full content production lifecycle, coordinating all production steps, aligning stakeholders and ensuring that all milestones, timelines and quality standards are met.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

## Requirements
- Master’s degree in Business Management, Marketing or Communications.
- Proven experience as a project manager in ecommerce or a digital content role, e-commerce or digital marketing.
- Excellent organizational and time management skills, with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously are key.
- Excellent communication and problem-solving skills.
- Strong attention to details and and ability to work in a fast-paced environment.
- Passion for visual communication, photography and design is key.
- Understanding of UX experience.
- Familiarity with project management tools and workflows.
- Fluent English is required; additional languages are considered a plus.
- Results-oriented, proactive, and execution-focused, with a strong sense of ownership.
- Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across multicultural and cross-functional teams.
- Positive attitude, collaborative team player, and able to work independently when required.

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility;
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

titleByLocale.fr: Spécialiste du Contenu & des Campagnes E-Commerce

descriptionByLocale.it: Rapportandosi direttamente al Capo dell'E-commerce, lo Specialista Content & Campagna E-Commerce svolgerà un ruolo globale chiave nelle attività di produzione e esecuzione di campagne digitali attraverso canali digitali di proprietà. L'obiettivo principale del ruolo è sovrintendere al ciclo di vita completo della produzione di contenuti, coordinando tutte le fasi di produzione, allineando gli stakeholder e assicurando che tutti i milestone, tempi e standard di qualità siano rispettati. RESPONSABILITÀ CHIAVE ## Requisiti - Laurea magistrale in Gestione aziendale, Marketing o Comunicazione. - Esperienza provata come project manager in ecommerce o ruolo di contenuto digitale, ecommerce o marketing digitale. - Eccellenti capacità organizzative e di gestione del tempo, con la capacità di gestire più progetti contemporaneamente sono fondamentali. - Eccellenti capacità di comunicazione e risoluzione dei problemi. - Forte attenzione ai dettagli e capacità di lavorare in un ambiente veloce. - Passione per la comunicazione visiva, la fotografia e il design è fondamentale. - Comprensione dell'esperienza UX. - Familiarità con gli strumenti e i flussi di lavoro di gestione dei progetti. - Inglese fluente è richiesto; lingue aggiuntive sono considerate un plus. - Orientato ai risultati, proattivo e focalizzato sull'esecuzione, con un forte senso di proprietà. - Forti capacità interpersonali e di comunicazione, con la capacità di collaborare efficacemente con team multiculturale e cross-funzionale. - Attitudine positiva, giocatore di squadra collaborativo e in grado di lavorare in modo indipendente quando richiesto. ## Vantaggi - Un ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Equilibrio tra lavoro e vita personale: Smart Working (modello di lavoro ibrido) e flessibilità oraria; - Programmi di salute fisica e mentale, progetti sostenibili e workshop promossi da Guess Community - Eventi artistici, sportivi e sociali al di fuori dell'ufficio, grazie alle nostre attività Guess Fun! - Piattaforma di formazione e sviluppo e percorsi - Sconto sui nostri prodotti sia online che in negozio
descriptionByLocale.en: Reporting directly to the Head of E-commerce, the E-commerce Content & Campaign Specialist will play a key global role in the activities of production and execution of digital campaigns across owned digital channels. The primary objective of the role is to oversee the full content production lifecycle, coordinating all production steps, aligning stakeholders and ensuring that all milestones, timelines and quality standards are met. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES ## Requirements - Master’s degree in Business Management, Marketing or Communications. - Proven experience as a project manager in ecommerce or a digital content role, e-commerce or digital marketing. - Excellent organizational and time management skills, with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously are key. - Excellent communication and problem-solving skills. - Strong attention to details and and ability to work in a fast-paced environment. - Passion for visual communication, photography and design is key. - Understanding of UX experience. - Familiarity with project management tools and workflows. - Fluent English is required; additional languages are considered a plus. - Results-oriented, proactive, and execution-focused, with a strong sense of ownership. - Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across multicultural and cross-functional teams. - Positive attitude, collaborative team player, and able to work independently when required. ## Benefits - An International, fresh and dynamic working environment - Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility; - Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community - Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities! - Training & Development platform and paths - Discount on our products both online and in stores
descriptionByLocale.de: Der E-Commerce-Inhalts- & Kampagnenspezialist wird direkt dem Leiter des E-Commerce unterstellt und spielt eine wichtige globale Rolle bei der Produktion und Ausführung von Digital-Kampagnen über eigene digitale Kanäle. Das Hauptziel der Rolle ist es, den gesamten Lebenszyklus der Inhaltsproduktion zu überwachen, alle Produktionsphasen zu koordinieren, die Stakeholder auszurichten und sicherzustellen, dass alle Meilensteine, Zeitpläne und Qualitätsstandards eingehalten werden. SCHLÜSSELVERANTWORTUNGEN ## Anforderungen - Master-Abschluss in Betriebswirtschaft, Marketing oder Kommunikation. - Erfahrung als Projektmanager im E-Commerce oder in einer digitalen Inhaltsrolle, E-Commerce oder Digital-Marketing. - Hervorragende organisatorische und zeitliche Fähigkeiten, mit der Fähigkeit, mehrere Projekte gleichzeitig zu verwalten, sind entscheidend. - Hervorragende Kommunikations- und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten. - Starke Aufmerksamkeit für Details und Fähigkeit, in einem schnellen Umfeld zu arbeiten. - Leidenschaft für visuelle Kommunikation, Fotografie und Design ist entscheidend. - Verständnis für die UX-Erfahrung. - Vertrautheit mit Projektmanagement-Tools und -Workflows. - Fließendes Englisch ist erforderlich; zusätzliche Sprachen sind ein Plus. - Ergebnisorientiert, proaktiv und ausführungsorientiert, mit einem starken Sinn für Eigentum. - Starke zwischenmenschliche und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, mit der Fähigkeit, effektiv mit multikulturellen und cross-funktionalen Teams zusammenzuarbeiten. - Positive Einstellung, kollaborativer Teamplayer und in der Lage, unabhängig zu arbeiten, wenn erforderlich. ## Vorteile - Ein internationales, frisches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld - Ausgeglichene Work-Life-Balance: Smart Working (Hybrid-Arbeitsmodell) und Zeitflexibilität; - Programme für körperliche und geistige Gesundheit, nachhaltige Projekte und Workshops, die von Guess Community gefördert werden - Kunst-, Sport- und Sozialveranstaltungen außerhalb des Büros, dank unserer Guess-Fun-Aktivitäten! - Schulungs- und Entwicklungsplattform und -wege - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte, sowohl online als auch in den Geschäften
descriptionByLocale.fr: Rapportant directement au Responsable de l'E-Commerce, le Spécialiste du Contenu & des Campagnes E-Commerce jouera un rôle clé au niveau mondial dans les activités de production et d'exécution de campagnes digitales à travers les canaux numériques détenus. L'objectif principal de ce rôle est de superviser le cycle de vie complet de la production de contenu, en coordonnant toutes les étapes de production, en alignant les parties prenantes et en veillant à ce que tous les jalons, les délais et les normes de qualité soient respectés. RESPONSABILITÉS CLÉS ## Exigences - Diplôme d'études supérieures en gestion d'entreprise, marketing ou communication. - Expérience avérée en tant que responsable de projet dans le commerce électronique ou dans un rôle de contenu numérique, commerce électronique ou marketing numérique. - Excellentes compétences en organisation et en gestion du temps, avec la capacité de gérer plusieurs projets simultanément, sont essentielles. - Excellentes compétences en communication et en résolution de problèmes. - Forte attention aux détails et capacité à travailler dans un environnement rapide. - Passion pour la communication visuelle, la photographie et le design est essentielle. - Compréhension de l'expérience UX. - Familiarité avec les outils et les flux de travail de gestion de projet. - Anglais courant est requis ; les langues supplémentaires sont considérées comme un plus. - Orienté vers les résultats, proactif et axé sur l'exécution, avec un fort sens de la propriété. - Fortes compétences interpersonnelles et de communication, avec la capacité de collaborer efficacement avec des équipes multiculturelles et transversales. - Attitude positive, joueur d'équipe collaboratif et capable de travailler de manière indépendante lorsque nécessaire. ## Avantages - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Équilibre entre vie professionnelle et vie personnelle : Smart Working (modèle de travail hybride) et flexibilité horaire; - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets durables et ateliers promus par Guess Community - Événements artistiques, sportifs et sociaux en dehors du bureau, grâce à nos activités Guess Fun! - Plateforme de formation et de développement et parcours - Réduction sur nos produits, en ligne et en magasin

jobs.title: E-commerce Omnichannel Intern

descriptionByLocale.it: Il Tirocinio E-commerce Omnicanale ha la missione di supportare il Progetto Manager E-commerce Omnicanale in tutte le attività relative ai progetti Omnicanale (Ship from Stores, Buy Online Pick up in-store, I-Pad in-store/GStock e, ove applicabile, Buy Online Return in-store). CORE RESPONSABILITÀ DEL LAVORO ## Requisiti - Laurea triennale; - Esperienza lavorativa precedente in Customer Care o in un negozio; - Buona conoscenza del pacchetto Office; - Abilità organizzative, cooperative e flessibili; - Abilità di lavoro in team e di comunicazione; - Attenzione ai dettagli; - Pensare fuori dagli schemi. ## Benefici - Un ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Equilibrio tra vita lavorativa e personale: Smart Working (modello di lavoro ibrido) e flessibilità oraria - Piattaforma di formazione e sviluppo e percorsi - Sconto sui nostri prodotti sia online che in negozi
descriptionByLocale.en: The E-Commerce Omnichannel Intern has the mission to support the E-commerce Omnichannel Project Manager in all activities related to Omnichannel projects (Ship from Stores, Buy Online Pick up in-store, I-Pad in-store/GStock and, where applicable, Buy Online Return in-store). CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES ## Requirements - Bachelor's degree; - Previous working experience in Customer Care or in a store; - Fluent English. Any additional language is considered a plus; - Good knowledge of Office package; - Organizational skills, cooperative and flexible; - Team working and communication skills; - Attention to details; - Think outside the box. ## Benefits - An International, fresh and dynamic working environment - Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility - Training & Development platform and paths - Discount on our products both online and in stores
descriptionByLocale.de: Der E-Commerce Omnichannel-Praktikant hat die Mission, dem E-Commerce Omnichannel-Projektmanager bei allen Aktivitäten, die mit Omnichannel-Projekten (Ship from Stores, Buy Online Pick up in-store, I-Pad in-store/GStock und, falls zutreffend, Buy Online Return in-store) zusammenhängen, zu unterstützen. KERNHAFTIGE ARBEITSFELDVERANTWORTUNGEN ## Anforderungen - Bachelor-Abschluss; - Vorherige Berufserfahrung in Customer Care oder in einem Laden; - Gute Kenntnisse des Office-Pakets; - Organisatorische Fähigkeiten, kooperative und flexible; - Teamarbeit und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten; - Aufmerksamkeit auf Details; - Denken außerhalb der Box. ## Vorteile - Ein internationales, frisches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld - Gleichgewicht zwischen Arbeit und Privatleben: Smart Working (Hybrid-Modell) und Zeitflexibilität - Ausbildung und Entwicklungsplattform und -wege - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in den Geschäften
descriptionByLocale.fr: Le Stage E-commerce Omnicanal a pour mission de soutenir le Responsable du Projet E-commerce Omnicanal dans toutes les activités liées aux projets Omnicanal (Ship from Stores, Buy Online Pick up in-store, I-Pad in-store/GStock et, si applicable, Buy Online Return in-store). RESPONSABILITÉS FONCIÈRES DU POSTE ## Exigences - Diplôme de licence; - Expérience professionnelle précédente en Customer Care ou dans un magasin; - Bonnes connaissances du logiciel Office; - Compétences organisationnelles, coopératives et flexibles; - Compétences de travail en équipe et de communication; - Attention aux détails; - Penser en dehors de la boîte. ## Avantages - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Équilibre entre vie professionnelle et personnelle : Smart Working (modèle de travail hybride) et flexibilité horaire - Plateforme de formation et de développement et parcours - Remise sur nos produits, tant en ligne qu'en magasin

jobs.title: E-Commerce Web Marketing, CRO and SEO Manager
jobs.description:
Reporting directly to the Chief Digital Officer, the E-Commerce Web Marketing, CRO & SEO Manager, is responsible for creating and implementing online marketing strategies to increase sales and revenue for Guess e-commerce website. He/she will maximize the technical and creative opportunities afforded by the breadth of Web-based static and social marketing in order to attract customers to the brand.

The role will deal with media buying, social networking and search engine optimization to maintain a client base and seek new clients. Moreover, the role has to drive direction out of ambiguity and question the status quo to get more out of marketing campaigns and website contents; he/she knows how to create sense of urgency for customers.

Another task will be the supervision of the entire Web Marketing team and all the activities performed by it.

## Requirements
- At least 8 years experience in web-marketing and CRO environment;
- At least 8 years experience in SEO and analytics Tools as Google Analytics, Google Trends, SEM Rush, Adobe Omniture and Google Search Console tool
- Proficiency knowledge of English language (both written and spoken). Any additional language is a plus
- Must possess strong leadership skills and be precise, well organized, self-motivated, focused on meeting deadlines and able to multitask within a fast-paced environment
- Attention to detail and follow-up;
- Excellent analytical and time management skills. Preference to work with number
- Excellent execution, high respect of deadlines and good level of proactivity
- Sense of ownership and pride in the performance and its impact on company’s success
- Capability of adapt to changes and work under pressure
- Critical thinker and problem-solving skills
- Capability to work under strict, short deadlines
- Positive attitude, team player, ability to work independently and to coordinate projects and people.
- Lead, mentor and support the other team members.
- Demonstrates strong decision-making ability
- Ability to drive & apply continuous improvement in process and tools
- Ability to establish and maintain harmonious working relationships with co-workers, staff and external contacts, and to work effectively in a professional team environment
- Excellent interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to interact with a diverse group at all level
- Interested to work in an international environment and to network with worldwide business units

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility;
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

jobs.title: Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon & North America)
jobs.description:
The Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon and North America) drives profitable brand growth on Amazon as both Vendor (1P) and Marketplace Seller (3P), while shaping marketplace strategy in North America. This role manages commercial performance, supports Amazon P&L, and ensures operational excellence, brand consistency, and sustained growth through coordination with Amazon, Marketplace NA, partners, and internal teams.

P&L and Business Management

Amazon Vendor & Seller Operations Management

Merchandising and Marketing Management

Reporting and Analytics

Additional Responsibilities Carry out additional tasks and projects as assigned in line with business needs.

## Requirements
- Relevant experience of more than 7/8 years in the field
- Previous experience in ecommerce roles with direct involvement in Amazon marketplace management (Vendor Central and/or Seller Central)
- Strong understanding of Amazon operations, merchandising and performance drivers
- Solid analytical skills with ability to interpret data and KPIs
- Expertise working with Excel for Data Analysis
- Strong commercial mindset with negotiation and stakeholder management skills
- Experience working with external agencies and cross-functional teams
- Good organizational and project management skills
- Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
- Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus

## Benefits
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile Key Account e Marketplace (Amazon e Nord America)
titleByLocale.en: Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon & North America)
titleByLocale.fr: Responsable Comptes Clés et Marketplace (Amazon et Amérique du Nord)

descriptionByLocale.it: Il Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon e Nord America) guida la crescita redditizia del marchio su Amazon sia come venditore (1P) che come venditore del marketplace (3P), mentre definisce la strategia del mercato in Nord America. Questo ruolo gestisce le prestazioni commerciali, supporta il P&L di Amazon e garantisce l'eccellenza operativa, la coerenza del marchio e una crescita sostenuta attraverso il coordinamento con Amazon, Marketplace NA, partner e team interni. Gestione profitti e perdite e gestione aziendale Gestione delle operazioni dei venditori e dei venditori Amazon Gestione del merchandising e del marketing Reporting e analisi Responsabilità aggiuntive Svolgere attività e progetti aggiuntivi assegnati in linea con le esigenze aziendali. ## Requisiti - Esperienza rilevante di oltre 7/8 anni nel settore - Precedente esperienza in ruoli di e-commerce con coinvolgimento diretto nella gestione del marketplace Amazon (Vendor Central e/o Seller Central) - Forte conoscenza delle operazioni di Amazon, del merchandising e dei fattori di performance - Solide capacità analitiche con capacità di interpretare dati e KPI - Competenza nell'uso di Excel per l'analisi dei dati - Forte mentalità commerciale con capacità di negoziazione e gestione delle parti interessate - Esperienza di lavoro con agenzie esterne e team interfunzionali - Buone capacità organizzative e di gestione dei progetti - Capacità di gestire più priorità in un ambiente frenetico - Forti capacità di comunicazione e gestione delle parti interessate - Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese; lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio ## Vantaggi - Equilibrio tra lavoro e vita personale: Smart Working (modello di lavoro ibrido) e flessibilità oraria - Un ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Programmi di salute fisica e mentale, progetti sostenibili e workshop promossi dalla Guess Community - Arti, sport ed eventi sociali fuori dall'ufficio, grazie alle nostre attività Guess Fun! - Piattaforma e percorsi di Formazione e Sviluppo - Sconti sui nostri prodotti sia online che nei negozi
descriptionByLocale.en: The Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon and North America) drives profitable brand growth on Amazon as both Vendor (1P) and Marketplace Seller (3P), while shaping marketplace strategy in North America. This role manages commercial performance, supports Amazon P&L, and ensures operational excellence, brand consistency, and sustained growth through coordination with Amazon, Marketplace NA, partners, and internal teams. P&L and Business Management Amazon Vendor & Seller Operations Management Merchandising and Marketing Management Reporting and Analytics Additional Responsibilities Carry out additional tasks and projects as assigned in line with business needs. ## Requirements - Relevant experience of more than 7/8 years in the field - Previous experience in ecommerce roles with direct involvement in Amazon marketplace management (Vendor Central and/or Seller Central) - Strong understanding of Amazon operations, merchandising and performance drivers - Solid analytical skills with ability to interpret data and KPIs - Expertise working with Excel for Data Analysis - Strong commercial mindset with negotiation and stakeholder management skills - Experience working with external agencies and cross-functional teams - Good organizational and project management skills - Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment - Strong communication and stakeholder management skills - Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus ## Benefits - Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility - An International, fresh and dynamic working environment - Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community - Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities! - Training & Development platform and paths - Discount on our products both online and in stores
descriptionByLocale.de: Der Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon und Nordamerika) treibt als Vendor (1P) und Marketplace Seller (3P) das profitable Markenwachstum auf Amazon voran und gestaltet gleichzeitig die Marktplatzstrategie in Nordamerika. Diese Rolle verwaltet die kommerzielle Leistung, unterstützt die Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung von Amazon und sorgt durch Koordination mit Amazon, Marketplace NA, Partnern und internen Teams für operative Exzellenz, Markenkonsistenz und nachhaltiges Wachstum. Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung und Geschäftsmanagement Amazon Vendor & Seller Operations Management Merchandising- und Marketingmanagement Reporting und Analysen Zusätzliche Verantwortlichkeiten Führen Sie zusätzliche Aufgaben und Projekte aus, die entsprechend den Geschäftsanforderungen zugewiesen werden. ## Anforderungen – Einschlägige Erfahrung von mehr als 7/8 Jahren in diesem Bereich – Frühere Erfahrung in E-Commerce-Positionen mit direkter Beteiligung an der Verwaltung des Amazon-Marktplatzes (Vendor Central und/oder Seller Central) – Ausgeprägtes Verständnis der Amazon-Abläufe, des Merchandising und der Leistungstreiber – Solide analytische Fähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, Daten und KPIs zu interpretieren – Fachkenntnisse im Umgang mit Excel für die Datenanalyse – Ausgeprägte kaufmännische Denkweise mit Verhandlungs- und Stakeholder-Management-Fähigkeiten – Erfahrung in der Arbeit mit externen Agenturen und funktionsübergreifenden Teams – Gute Organisations- und Projektmanagementfähigkeiten – Fähigkeit, mehrere Prioritäten zu verwalten ein schnelllebiges Umfeld – ausgeprägte Kommunikations- und Stakeholder-Managementfähigkeiten – fließend Englisch; zusätzliche Sprachen sind ein Plus ## Vorteile – Balance zwischen Arbeit und Privatleben: Intelligentes Arbeiten (hybrides Arbeitsmodell) und Zeitflexibilität – Ein internationales, frisches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld – Programme für körperliche und geistige Gesundheit, nachhaltige Projekte und Workshops, gefördert von Guess Community – Kunst, Sport und gesellschaftliche Veranstaltungen außerhalb des Büros, dank unserer Guess Fun-Aktivitäten! - Schulungs- und Entwicklungsplattform und -pfade - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in Geschäften
descriptionByLocale.fr: Le responsable des comptes clés et du marché (Amazon et Amérique du Nord) stimule la croissance rentable de la marque sur Amazon en tant que fournisseur (1P) et vendeur du marché (3P), tout en façonnant la stratégie du marché en Amérique du Nord. Ce rôle gère les performances commerciales, prend en charge Amazon P&L et garantit l'excellence opérationnelle, la cohérence de la marque et une croissance soutenue grâce à la coordination avec Amazon, Marketplace NA, les partenaires et les équipes internes. Gestion du P&L et de l'entreprise Gestion des opérations des fournisseurs et vendeurs Amazon Gestion du merchandising et du marketing Reporting et analyses Responsabilités supplémentaires Effectuer des tâches et des projets supplémentaires assignés en fonction des besoins de l'entreprise. ## Exigences - Expérience pertinente de plus de 7/8 ans dans le domaine - Expérience antérieure dans des rôles de commerce électronique avec une implication directe dans la gestion du marché Amazon (Vendor Central et/ou Seller Central) - Forte compréhension des opérations, du merchandising et des moteurs de performance d'Amazon - Solides compétences analytiques avec capacité à interpréter les données et les KPI - Expertise de travail avec Excel pour l'analyse des données - Fort esprit commercial avec des compétences en négociation et en gestion des parties prenantes - Expérience de travail avec des agences externes et des équipes interfonctionnelles - Bonnes compétences organisationnelles et de gestion de projet - Capacité à gérer plusieurs priorités dans un environnement en évolution rapide - Solides compétences en communication et en gestion des parties prenantes - Anglais courant ; des langues supplémentaires sont un plus ## Avantages - Équilibre entre travail et vie personnelle : Travail intelligent (modèle de travail hybride) et flexibilité horaire - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets et ateliers durables promus par Guess Community - Arts, sports et événements sociaux en dehors du bureau, grâce à nos activités Guess Fun ! - Plateforme et parcours de formation et de développement - Remise sur nos produits en ligne et en magasin

jobs.title: Product Developer Jewellery
jobs.description:
The Product Developer Jewellery is responsible for the development and planning of products throughout their lifecycle, including gathering and prioritizing product requirements, working closely with Design, Sales and Marketing teams and ensuring revenue and customer satisfaction. The role will also ensure that the product supports the business’ overall strategy and goals.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

ACTIVITIES

Product Development and Sourcing

Database and Style Creation

Vendor Monitoring

Interacting with other Guess departments

## Requirements
- Experience: years 3-5 of experience in a similar role in Jewellery field
- Education: University Degree
- Excellent knowledge of written and spoken English is mandatory. Any other European language is considered as a plus
- PC Skills: expert in Excel, strong experience in using planning and analytical systems, AS400 (Stealth)
- Proactively works toward set goals and has a problem solving mind-set
- Must possess the ability to handle multiple tasks/projects with adherence to deadlines
- Team player, dynamic personality, fast thinker, positive attitude and sense of urgency
- Open-minded and excellent interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to interact with a diverse group at all levels
- Availability to travel – including intercontinentally

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

descriptionByLocale.it: Il Product Developer Gioielli è responsabile dello sviluppo e della pianificazione dei prodotti durante tutta la loro vita ciclo, compresa la raccolta e la priorizzazione delle richieste dei prodotti, il lavoro in collaborazione con i team di Design, Vendite e Marketing e l'assicurazione della soddisfazione dei clienti e del fatturato. Il ruolo assicurerà anche che il prodotto supporti la strategia e gli obiettivi aziendali complessivi. CORE RESPONSABILITÀ DEL LAVORO ATTIVITÀ Sviluppo dei prodotti e Sourcing Creazione del database e dello stile Monitoraggio dei fornitori Interazione con altri dipartimenti Guess ## REQUISITI - Esperienza: anni 3-5 di esperienza in un ruolo simile nel campo dei Gioielli - Educazione: Laurea - Ottima conoscenza della lingua inglese scritta e parlata è obbligatoria. Altre lingue europee sono considerate un plus - Abilità informatiche: esperto in Excel, esperienza forte nell'uso di sistemi di pianificazione e analisi, AS400 (Stealth) - Lavora proattivamente verso gli obiettivi prefissati e ha un mindset di risoluzione dei problemi - Deve possedere l'abilità di gestire più compiti/progetti con rispetto dei tempi di scadenza - Collaboratore di squadra, personalità dinamica, pensatore veloce, atteggiamento positivo e senso di urgenza - Aperto e dotato di eccellenti abilità interpersonali e di comunicazione con la capacità di interagire con un gruppo diverso a tutti i livelli - Disponibilità a viaggiare – compreso intercontinentali ## BENEFICI - Un ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Programmi di salute fisica e mentale, progetti sostenibili e workshop promossi dalla Guess Community - Eventi di arte, sport e socializzazione fuori dall'ufficio, grazie alle nostre Guess Fun activities! - Piattaforma di formazione e sviluppo e percorsi - Sconto sui nostri prodotti sia online che in negozio

descriptionByLocale.de: Der Produktentwickler Schmuck ist für die Entwicklung und Planung von Produkten während ihres Lebenszyklus verantwortlich, einschließlich der Sammlung und Priorisierung von Produktanforderungen, der Arbeit in enger Zusammenarbeit mit den Teams von Design, Verkauf und Marketing und der Gewährleistung von Umsatz und Kundenzufriedenheit. Die Rolle wird auch sicherstellen, dass das Produkt die strategischen Ziele und Ziele des Unternehmens unterstützt. KERNHAFTES ARBEITSFELD AKTIVITÄTEN Produktentwicklung und Sourcing Datenbank- und Stil-Erstellung Lieferantenüberwachung Interaktion mit anderen Guess-Abteilungen ## Anforderungen - Erfahrung: 3-5 Jahre Erfahrung in einem ähnlichen Beruf im Schmuckbereich - Ausbildung: Universitätsabschluss - Ausgezeichnete Kenntnisse der schriftlichen und mündlichen englischen Sprache sind obligatorisch. Andere europäische Sprachen werden als Plus angesehen - PC-Fähigkeiten: Experte in Excel, starker Erfahrung im Einsatz von Planungs- und Analyse-Systemen, AS400 (Stealth) - Proaktiv arbeitet gegenüber festgelegten Zielen und hat ein Problemlösungsdenken - Muss die Fähigkeit besitzen, mehrere Aufgaben/Vorhaben mit Einhaltung der Fristen zu bewältigen - Teamplayer, dynamische Persönlichkeit, schneller Denker, positives Verhalten und Sinn für Dringlichkeit - Offen und ausgezeichnete Interpersonen- und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, mit einer vielfältigen Gruppe auf allen Ebenen zu interagieren - Verfügbarkeit zum Reisen – einschließlich interkontinental ## Vorteile - Ein internationales, frisches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld - Physische und mentale Gesundheitsprogramme, nachhaltige Projekte und Workshops, die von der Guess Community gefördert werden - Kunst, Sport und soziale Veranstaltungen außerhalb des Büros, dank unserer Guess Fun-Aktivitäten! - Bildungs- und Entwicklungsplattform und -wege - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in den Geschäften
descriptionByLocale.fr: Le Développeur de Produits Bijoux est responsable de l'élaboration et de la planification des produits tout au long de leur cycle de vie, y compris la collecte et la priorisation des exigences des produits, le travail en étroite collaboration avec les équipes de Design, Vente et Marketing et l'assurance de la satisfaction des clients et du chiffre d'affaires. Le poste assurera également que le produit soutienne la stratégie et les objectifs globaux de l'entreprise. CORE RESPONSABILITÉS DU TRAVAIL ACTIVITÉS Développement de produits et Sourcing Création de la base de données et du style Surveillance des fournisseurs Interaction avec d'autres départements Guess ## Exigences - Expérience: 3-5 ans d'expérience dans un rôle similaire dans le domaine des Bijoux - Éducation: Diplôme universitaire - Connaissance excellente de l'anglais écrit et parlé est obligatoire. Les autres langues européennes sont considérées comme un plus - Compétences informatiques : expert en Excel, expérience forte dans l'utilisation de systèmes de planification et d'analyse, AS400 (Stealth) - Travaille proactivement envers les objectifs fixés et a un mindset de résolution de problèmes - Doit posséder la capacité de gérer plusieurs tâches/projets avec respect des délais - Collaborateur d'équipe, personnalité dynamique, penseur rapide, attitude positive et sens de l'urgence - Ouvert et doté de compétences interpersonnelles et de communication exceptionnelles avec la capacité d'interagir avec un groupe diversifié à tous les niveaux - Disponibilité pour voyager – y compris intercontinentaux ## Avantages - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets durables et ateliers promus par la Guess Community - Événements d'art, de sport et de socialisation en dehors de l'entreprise, grâce à nos Guess Fun activités! - Plateforme de formation et de développement et chemins - Remise sur nos produits, tant en ligne qu'en magasin

jobs.title: Receptionist Intern
jobs.description:
We are looking for a Receptionist Intern, who will join the team based between Bioggio and Stabio. The role will manage and support all activities related to Reception area being at the disposal of all Guess Departments for any kind of support.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

## Requirements
- Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Languages or Communication and/or similar field
- Excellent knowledge of English, any other languages is considered a plus
- Passion and attitude in fashion field
- Being flexible and with high level of cultural sensitivity
- Excellent oral and written communication skills
- Having good interpersonal skills: being polite, a good listener, always smiling and with excellent customer service skills
- Be able to meet people’s needs and find solutions in a timely manner
- Be able to relay information to others, interact and well communicate at all levels of the company organization with tact and diplomacy
- Precise and with strong attention to details
- Critical thinking using logic and reasoning to identify the strengths and weaknesses of alternative solutions, conclusions or approaches to problems
- Good judgment, proven responsibility and trustworthy in handling confidential information
- Well organized, having the ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously in a fast-paced environment, set priorities and work both independently and in a team environment
- Good level in Microsoft - Excel, Word, PowerPoint

## Benefits
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

descriptionByLocale.it: Siamo alla ricerca di un Interno Receptionist, che si unirà al team con sede tra Bioggio e Stabio. Il ruolo gestirà e sosterrà tutte le attività legate all'area Reception essendo a disposizione di tutti i servizi di Guess per qualsiasi tipo di supporto. RISPOSTE DI GIOCO ## Requisiti - Corso di laurea o Diploma in Lingue o Comunicazione e/o campo simile - Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese, qualsiasi altra lingua è considerata un plus - Passione e atteggiamento nel campo della moda - Essere flessibile e ad alto livello di sensibilità culturale - Eccellente capacità di comunicazione orale e scritta - Avere buone capacità interpersonali: essere educato, un buon ascoltatore, sempre sorridente e con ottime capacità di servizio al cliente - Essere in grado di soddisfare le esigenze delle persone e trovare soluzioni in modo tempestivo - Essere in grado di relay informazioni ad altri, interagire e comunicare bene a tutti i livelli dell'organizzazione aziendale con tatto e diplomazia - Preciso e con forte attenzione ai dettagli - Pensiero critico utilizzando logica e ragionamento per identificare i punti di forza e di debolezza delle soluzioni alternative, conclusioni o approcci ai problemi - Buon giudizio, comprovata responsabilità e affidabile nel trattamento delle informazioni riservate - Ben organizzato, avendo la capacità di gestire più compiti contemporaneamente in un ambiente frenetico, impostare le priorità e lavorare sia in modo indipendente che in un ambiente di squadra - Buon livello in Microsoft - Excel, Word, PowerPoint ## Vantaggi - Equilibrio tra lavoro e vita personale: Smart Working (modello di lavoro Hybrid) e flessibilità del tempo - Un ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Programmi di salute fisica e mentale, progetti sostenibili e workshop promossi da Guess Community - Arti, eventi sportivi e sociali fuori dall'ufficio, grazie alle nostre attività di Guess Fun! - Piattaforma e percorsi di formazione e sviluppo - Sconto sui nostri prodotti sia online che nei negozi

The role will manage and support all activities related to Reception area being at the disposal of all Guess Departments for any kind of support. CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES ## Requirements - Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Languages or Communication and/or similar field - Excellent knowledge of English, any other languages is considered a plus - Passion and attitude in fashion field - Being flexible and with high level of cultural sensitivity - Excellent oral and written communication skills - Having good interpersonal skills: being polite, a good listener, always smiling and with excellent customer service skills - Be able to meet people’s needs and find solutions in a timely manner - Be able to relay information to others, interact and well communicate at all levels of the company organization with tact and diplomacy - Precise and with strong attention to details - Critical thinking using logic and reasoning to identify the strengths and weaknesses of alternative solutions, conclusions or approaches to problems - Good judgment, proven responsibility and trustworthy in handling confidential information - Well organized, having the ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously in a fast-paced environment, set priorities and work both independently and in a team environment - Good level in Microsoft - Excel, Word, PowerPoint ## Benefits - Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility - An International, fresh and dynamic working environment - Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community - Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities! - Training & Development platform and paths - Discount on our products both online and in stores
descriptionByLocale.de: Wir suchen einen Receptionist Intern, der sich dem Team mit Bioggio und Stabio anschließen wird. Die Rolle wird alle Aktivitäten im Zusammenhang mit der Rezeption verwalten und unterstützen, die allen Guess Departments für jede Art von Unterstützung zur Verfügung stehen. CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES Â Anforderungen - Bachelor-Abschluss oder Diplom in Sprachen oder Kommunikation und/oder ähnliches Feld - Ausgezeichnete Englischkenntnisse, alle anderen Sprachen gelten als Plus - Leidenschaft und Haltung im Modebereich - flexibel sein und mit hohem Niveau der kulturellen Sensibilität - Ausgezeichnete mündliche und schriftliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten - Gute zwischenmenschliche Fähigkeiten haben: höflich, ein guter Zuhörer, immer lächelnd und mit ausgezeichneten Kundenservice Fähigkeiten - Lernen Sie die Bedürfnisse der Menschen zu erfüllen und Lösungen rechtzeitig zu finden - In der Lage sein, Informationen an andere weiterzugeben, auf allen Ebenen der Unternehmensorganisation mit Takt und Diplomatie kommunizieren - Präzise und mit großer Aufmerksamkeit auf Details - Kritisches Denken mit Logik und Argumentation, um die Stärken und Schwächen alternativer Lösungen, Schlussfolgerungen oder Ansätze für Probleme zu identifizieren - Gutes Urteil, bewährte Verantwortung und vertrauenswürdige Umgang mit vertraulichen Informationen - gut organisiert - Trainings- und Entwicklungsplattform und -wege - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in den Läden
descriptionByLocale.fr: Nous sommes à la recherche d'un stagiaire réceptionniste, qui se joindra à l'équipe basée entre Bioggio et Stabio. Ce rôle permettra de gérer et de soutenir toutes les activités liées à la zone d'accueil, qui sont à la disposition de tous les ministères de prévisions pour tout type de soutien. CORE EMPLOI RESPONSABILITÉS ## Exigences - Baccalauréat ou diplôme en langues ou en communication et/ou domaine similaire - Excellente connaissance de l'anglais, toute autre langue est considérée comme un plus - Passion et attitude dans le domaine de la mode - Être flexible et avec un haut niveau de sensibilité culturelle - Excellentes compétences en communication orale et écrite - Avoir de bonnes compétences interpersonnelles: être poli, un bon auditeur, toujours souriant et avec d'excellentes compétences en service à la clientèle - Être capable de répondre aux besoins des gens et de trouver des solutions en temps opportun - Être capable de transmettre l'information aux autres, d'interagir et de bien communiquer à tous les niveaux de l'organisation de l'entreprise avec tact et diplomatie - Précis et avec une grande attention aux détails - Pensée critique en utilisant la logique et le raisonnement pour identifier les forces et les faiblesses des solutions alternatives, des conclusions ou des approches aux problèmes - Bon jugement, responsabilité prouvée et confiance dans le traitement de l'information confidentielle - Bien organisé, ayant la capacité de gérer simultanément plusieurs tâches dans un environnement à rythme rapide, fixer des priorités et travailler de façon indépendante et en équipe - Bon niveau dans Microsoft - Excel, Word, PowerPoint ## Avantages - Équilibre entre le travail et la vie personnelle : travail intelligent (modèle de travail hybride) et flexibilité du temps - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets durables et atelier promu par Guess Community - Arts, sports et événements sociaux à l'extérieur du bureau, grâce à nos activités Guess Fun! - Plateforme et chemins de formation et de développement - Réduction sur nos produits en ligne et en magasin

requirements: Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Languages or Communication and/or similar field
Excellent knowledge of English, any other languages is considered a plus
Passion and attitude in fashion field
Being flexible and with high level of cultural sensitivity
Excellent oral and written communication skills
Having good interpersonal skills: being polite, a good listener, always smiling and with excellent customer service skills
Be able to meet people’s needs and find solutions in a timely manner
Be able to relay information to others, interact and well communicate at all levels of the company organization with tact and diplomacy
Precise and with strong attention to details
Critical thinking using logic and reasoning to identify the strengths and weaknesses of alternative solutions, conclusions or approaches to problems
Good judgment, proven responsibility and trustworthy in handling confidential information
Well organized, having the ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously in a fast-paced environment, set priorities and work both independently and in a team environment
Good level in Microsoft - Excel, Word, PowerPoint

Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
